title: What you can do with the QuickBooks Online Accounting API
agent_notes: Official overview states the QuickBooks Online Accounting API is REST-based, uses standard HTTP methods and JSON, and maps entities to customer-facing accounting forms and tools.

title: Basic schema and data formats for the QuickBooks Online Accounting API
agent_notes: Official REST feature guide for base URL and operation format grounding.

agent_notes: Official API Explorer entity page for Bill operations and fields.

title: BillPayment entity

title: QuickBooks Online Accounting API error codes
agent_notes: Official error-code guide documents HTTP status codes, Fault envelopes, ValidationFault, AuthorizationFault, stale object, permission, duplicate, and rate-limit cases.
